description_short: Built with Pinhole Tech Latex & AirGen™ Memory Foam, this mattress gives 5-zone body support & promotes overnight recovery.

construction_layers.name: High Density Foam
construction_layers.notes: Base support. 4-6 inches depending on total height SKU (6"/8").

dimensions_by_size.notes: Available across same widths as 6in SKUs

pricing.notes: From compare page also reported ₹8799 starting — pricing fluctuates by promotion.

faq_specs.question: How to select height?
faq_specs.answer: Under 60kg sleeper weight: 6-inch mattress. 60-80kg: 8-inch. Above 80kg: 10-inch (10" not standard on this SKU).

faq_specs.question: Where should I place the mattress?
faq_specs.answer: Make sure the mattress is placed on a solid foundation to prevent uneven weight distribution.

notes_observed: Salvaged from earlier session's raw markdown dump (58KB). Density/ILD values not in raw; sized variants extracted from listing table but full price grid not available without variant select. Use compare-mattresses.json + product page as cross-reference.
